name: Grade 6 Language Arts — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 6 pathway for argument, explanatory writing, revision, media literacy, and presentations. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 6 knowledge and transferable skills in argument, explanatory writing, revision, media literacy, and presentations.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: argument, explanatory writing, revision, media literacy, and presentations
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about argument, explanatory writing, revision, media literacy, and presentations and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.

activities.title: Question and evidence
activities.learnerAction: The learner develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about argument, explanatory writing, revision, media literacy, and presentations, documents evidence in an age-appropriate format, and follows applicable safety, ethics, and collaboration expectations.
